amendment_law: v0 rows stay live; v1 adds plan-aware fields; on direct conflict v1 wins. This registry is designed with zero direct conflicts: every identity field below is copied verbatim from v0 and only plan-aware fields (plan_types_served, plan_notes) plus the two plan-type maps are added.
laws: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
rule: Cloud-only; trigger is dispatch, event, or event+dispatch only, no cron in v0; every line writes a receipt; founder approvals are structural gates, not conventions; preview never production; every line enters at assist_only; every plan run resolves its line_plan against this registry; a plan naming a line not in this registry is a lint reject

relationship.trustfield_ops_lines: data/cloud_line_registry_v1.json — untouched sibling registry (venture ops), not superseded
relationship.factory_line_registry_v0: cloud-factory/FACTORY_LINE_REGISTRY_v0.json — stays live as the base law for line identity, triggers, targets, receipts, input/output artifacts, failure behavior, founder approval points, autonomy states, and activation preconditions; this v1 registry adds plan-aware fields only and does not supersede it

lines.name: Research Line
lines.plan_notes: Serves every plan band except deploy (PLAN-0401..PLAN-0500) and verification (PLAN-0501..PLAN-0600), which start from existing artifacts. Read-only research inside the plan's authority_scope; per-URL evidence discipline unchanged from v0. claude_cloud_agent primary remains dormant until the founder wires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — plans whose line_plan includes this line carry the blocked_target_penalty in PLAN_RANKING_ROI_MODEL_v1 until then.

lines.name: Architecture Line
lines.plan_notes: Present in the same eight bands as FL1; produces the architecture_package that fixes the run's concrete line_plan. Every proposed line_plan resolves against this registry — a plan naming a line not in this registry is a lint reject. Soup wall unchanged from v0: downstream worker prompts carry only the seven allowed task-spec keys (goal, files, constraints, done_criteria, verify_method, receipts_required, decision_verdict); P0 CORE judgment text never enters factory worker prompts. model_tier judgment is inherited from v0 line law and is subject to each plan's model_policy.premium_rule and the premium_model_penalty in ranking.

lines.name: Code Line
lines.plan_notes: In v1 band defaults, direct code writes serve only compliance_governance (audit/patch change sets) and site_app_repair (broken-route diagnosis + patch PR); other plan types build through FL4/FL5 template paths instead. All output stays on sandbox/factory/* branches through full repo fences — no direct main writes (W1 wall); env_profile deny-by-default, no send-capable credentials in the sandbox (v0 law unchanged).

lines.name: No-Code App Builder Line
lines.plan_notes: Default builder for the app_builder band. The revenue band spine names FL5|FL4 — plan instantiation selects exactly one of the two (FL4 when the offer asset is app-led). Builds manifests and drafts only, deploys nothing (v0 law unchanged); production deploy of any built app stays FOUNDER_ONLY (CF-P4+). Railway/Supabase are still not motor kinds in data/github_automation_registry_v1.json — registry amendment when built.

lines.name: Workflow Builder Line
lines.plan_notes: Serves workflow_builder, revenue (FL5|FL4 alternative, workflow-led side), client_onboarding, and automation_cron bands. automation_cron plans (PLAN-0901..PLAN-1000) compile and dry-run workflow definitions ONLY: activation of any schedule is double-locked — FOUNDER-UNLOCK-CF-CRON plus per-workflow founder activation; recurring_copilot_automation is forbidden today. Drafts only; this line never activates, schedules, or registers anything (v0 law unchanged).

lines.name: Test Line
lines.plan_notes: Gate for every band that produces a buildable change set — all except research and verification, whose spines carry no build artifact. A failing suite is a verdict, not a line failure: FAIL report still receipts (v0 law unchanged). Deterministic execution, no LLM; merges to main always pass full repo fences and sandbox/factory/* is NOT fence-exempt.

lines.name: Deploy-Preview Line
lines.plan_notes: PREVIEW ONLY — v0 law unchanged: production deploy is NOT part of the substrate (no_deploy gate + HARD_BLOCK reason 2). deploy-band plans (PLAN-0401..PLAN-0500) terminate at preview_artifact; production promote stays FOUNDER_ONLY via existing paths outside the substrate. CF caveat unchanged: cloudflare_worker secondary is unusable under CF tool_law (Phase 3/4 control-plane deferral; v0 permits only the existing verifier read/verify path) — requires a PROPOSED founder-ratified amendment before use; github_actions is the only operable preview path.

lines.name: Verifier Line
lines.plan_notes: pass_rule unchanged from v0: PASS only from secondary CF account edge receipt (account b7282b4a5c17b84d62e3ef8866b878f8, worker sina-governance-ssot-advisory) — never builder self-report (autonomy loop L3 law). Serves every band except research. Plan hook: FL8 external PASS is the only event that counts toward reuse_bonus and the >=5 verified runs of the auto_dispatch_gate in PLAN_RANKING_ROI_MODEL_v1; verification-band plans (PLAN-0501..PLAN-0600) run the minimal FL8,FL9 spine.

lines.name: Receipt Line
lines.plan_notes: The only line in all ten plan bands — no plan run reaches CLOSED without a complete receipt chain. Escalation unchanged from v0 and machine-first: retry-if-ROI-positive -> repair candidate -> L4 self-repair -> L6 deep research -> review queue; hygiene red never routes to founder (codified anti-pattern). Plan hook: per-run cost and verdict rollups (line receipt -> run receipt -> scorecard counters.cost_usd) are the evidence base for reuse_bonus and the cost-under-cap condition of the auto_dispatch_gate.

lines.name: Harvest Line
lines.plan_notes: Draft-PR-only harvest unchanged from v0: harvested rows travel as branch + PR through full repo fences — never a direct data/ write (W2 wall; assist != authority; never_auto: promote_without_receipt). Plan hook: no-match orders and reusable run patterns become DRAFT plan records (status draft) for the 1000-plan library; founder receipt ratifies seed -> testing -> active, version immutable once active, retired never deleted (plan_library_v1 growth_law). Serves the five bands whose default spines end in harvest.

deploy.note: preview only; production stays FOUNDER_ONLY outside the substrate

revenue.note: offers/funnels as DRAFTS; no sends, no pricing claims without founder

automation_cron.note: compiles + previews ONLY; activation of any schedule is double-locked: FOUNDER-UNLOCK-CF-CRON + per-workflow founder activation (recurring_copilot_automation is forbidden today)

line_plan_resolution_note: The token FL5|FL4 in the revenue band is an instantiation-time alternative, not a line id: the instantiated plan's line_plan array contains only concrete FL ids (exactly one of FL5 or FL4 for revenue). Every id in an instantiated line_plan must exist in this registry; an unknown id is a lint reject.
plan_type_risk_defaults_note: Defaults, overridable per plan. High-risk transitions — anything touching production, spend, sends, legal/equity/payment claims, schedule activation, or governance zones — REQUIRE founder/client approval (approvals_required + risk_class; rule 7 of the founder order).
activation_note: DESIGN ONLY — status PROPOSED. Nothing in this registry is built, active, or verified. The v0 activation preconditions (cloud-factory/FACTORY_LINE_REGISTRY_v0.json activation block: motor registered in data/github_automation_registry_v1.json, founder phase receipt CF-P1, sandbox manager ledger exists) apply unchanged to every line before any plan run.
